infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pawbuck uses your location during a Pawthon walk to measure distance for your pet’s activity and weekly challenges.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Pawbuck uses your location during walks to track distance. You can choose “While Using the App” for foreground tracking.

plugins.photosPermission: Pawbuck accesses your photo library to let you upload pet profile pictures, vaccination records, lab results, clinical exam documents, and medicine prescriptions. For example, you can select a photo of your pet's vaccine certificate to add it to their health record.
plugins.cameraPermission: Pawbuck uses your camera to let you capture pet profile pictures, vaccination records, lab results, clinical exam documents, and medicine prescriptions. For example, you can take a photo of your pet's prescription label to track their medications.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Pawbuck tracks your location only while a Pawthon walk is active to measure walking distance for your pet.

plugins.microphonePermission: Pawbuck uses the microphone so you can speak messages to Milo instead of typing.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Pawbuck converts your speech to text in Milo chat. Audio is processed on your device where supported.
